title: Lesson Eight: Por qué, venir and debo
concepts: How to ask 'Why?', the verb to come and how to say 'I must'

sentences.english: I am going to confiscate it
I am going to examine it
I want to see it
I want to see her
I want to see you (formal)
You (formal) want to visit me
He wants to visit me
She wants to visit me
Do you (formal) want to visit me
Does he want to visit me
Does she want to visit me
You (formal) don't want to visit me
He doesn't want to visit me
She doesn't want to visit me
Don't you (formal) want to visit me
Doesn't he want to visit me
Doesn't she want to visit me
Why don't you (formal) want to visit me
Why doesn't he want to visit me
Why doesn't she want to visit me
Do you (formal) want to come
Do you (formal) want to come to the house
Do you (formal) want to come to visit me
Don't you (formal) want to come to visit me

sentences.spanish: Por qué no quiere venir a visitarme?
sentences.english: Why don't you (formal) want to come to visit me
I must continue
I must identify it
I must identify them
I must identify them (feminine words)
